boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Not satisfied: STD-BOR-082-P requires activation authority to match consent-status class before enrollment, but AUTH-BOR-082 states 'current IRB-approved consent C12' without specifying the consent-status class itself.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-BOR-082-P mandates consent-status class match; AUTH-BOR-082 omits this term.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Source record AUTH-BOR-082 provides site B-18, protocol P8.1, consent version C12, and activation date 2026-06-28, but is missing the required consent-status class term. FEAS-BOR-082 explicitly requires consent status to be 'separately verified' before enrollment, reinforcing the gap. The abstract-field trap (047-style) is confirmed: 'current IRB-approved consent' is not the same as 'consent-status class.'
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: AUTH-BOR-082 is current and covers the activation scope (site B-18, protocol P8.1, date 2026-06-28) but lacks the consent-status class. No other source provides this term. Timing/scope/authority are satisfied; dependency on consent-status class verification is not met.

open_blockers: AUTH-BOR-082 does not state the consent-status class required by STD-BOR-082-P
FEAS-BOR-082 explicitly defers consent-status verification, contradicting closure
No source in packet provides the consent-status class term
